message:
test(connector-fabric): add 90 property-based tests for inbound bridge, outbound bridge, and mesh

Three new proptest suites covering the connector fabric subsystem:
- proptest_connector_outbound_bridge (33 tests): routing rules, sandbox enforcement,
  deduplication, dispatch queue bounds, telemetry, serde roundtrips
- proptest_connector_inbound_bridge (29 tests): signal construction, rule ID generation,
  deduplication, severity mapping, config roundtrips, bridge routing
- proptest_connector_mesh (28 tests): host/zone registration, health state machine,
  routing strategies, capacity tracking, heartbeat timeouts, telemetry, serde

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
